results.taskDescription: Fetch 25 posts; output top 3 by COMMENTS (not score). Tests filtering accuracy + faithful citation under selection pressure.
Fetch 20 posts; output 'highest score' AND 'most comments' as two separate sections. Tests synthesis of multiple slices from one observation.
Fetch top 15 HN posts and write a paragraph-style summary categorizing them by topic. Tests substantive synthesis from observation data.
results.output:
# Today on Hacker News

## AI/ML and Technology Trends
Several posts highlight the evolving landscape of artificial intelligence. One story discusses Fast16, a mysterious software sabotage operation that preceded Stuxnet by five years. Another piece from OpenAI explains why SWE-bench Verified is no longer used for measuring advanced coding capabilities. The report also introduces TurboQuant, an interactive tool offering a first-principles walkthrough.

## Software Development and Tools
There's notable activity in the software development space. A post details efforts to revive Friendster with modern updates, while another introduces EvanFlow, a TDD-driven feedback loop for programming. Additionally, there are updates on tools like Notepad++ for Mac users and Rust's memory-saving Box implementation.

## Hardware and Infrastructure
Several stories focus on hardware developments and infrastructure. These include discussions around Unix Magic poster annotations, the fastest Linux timestamps, and the challenges faced when your digital life vanishes unexpectedly. The Western Monarch butterfly decline story highlights environmental concerns.

## Other Notable Stories
Google's strategic move to catch up with Amazon and Microsoft in cloud services using AI advancements makes headlines. Also notable is a piece on self-updating screenshots technology, demonstrating innovations in visual presentation tools.
